'''Tyed Kant''' was an inhabited [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]<ref name="MC" /> in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> near [[Demophon]]. It was the only [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kantel system]].<ref name="MC" />

==Description==
Tyed Kant had a small habitable zone in the upper [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] where the air was breathable. This discovery led to the manufacturing of floating ranches, supported by [[Repulsorlift generator/Legends|repulsorlift generators]], to take advantage of the fertile atmosphere. These floating ranches covered half the visible surface of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Even in the habitable zone, Tyed Kant's atmosphere contained a mix of many elements. The result was a breeding ground for bacteria and disease. Because of this, [[Environment suit/Legends|environment suits]] were recommended at all times, despite the air being capable of sustaining [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] life. The most visible native species were the [[Iagoin]], semi-intelligent creatures that floated among the gaseous clouds.<ref name="MC" />

==History==
Seeking freedom, it seceded from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], only to be taken over by the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]].<ref name="HNN" /> It was the headquarters of [[Imperial Meats and Produce]].<ref name="FOP">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref>

==Inhabitants==
Nearly all of the inhabitants of Tyed Kant lived in [[Paragon (city)|Paragon]], a hovering, disk-shaped, [[Skyscraper/Legends|skyscraper]]-riddled metropolis. The planet's primary export was its [[Aeroponics|aeroponically grown]] [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]], primarily for the nearby [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. As the predicted Demophon [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] drew closer, however, the people of Tyed Kant became increasingly desperate to find new markets.<ref name="MC" />

For about 30 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] the planet passed through the belts of stellar debris in the [[Kantel system]]. During this period no crops were grown, the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] was closed to all but emergency personnel, protective [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] were raised, and the whole planet enjoyed an extended holiday known as the [[Starlight Festival]].<ref name="MC" />
